title: Whistleblower Dave Grusch: Are UFOs The Religion Behind All Others?
summary: A brief discussion between Jesse Michels and Dave Grusch exploring whether the UAP phenomenon could be the foundational source behind all world religions, potentially reconciling science and religion by providing 'source code' that validates certain religious texts.

key_claims.claim: The phenomenon has probably already influenced all the other religions
The phenomenon could bring science and religion together, reconciling two fields that have been separated since the Enlightenment
This could potentially prove certain religious texts like Ezekiel's account of seeing a wheel
